name: Collins Foods Limited
analysis: CKF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$8.5900, stop A$7.9893, target A$10.2550 (2.77:1) — then trail it.
